name: compact_maintenance
description: Create context snapshots for sessions that exceed the compaction threshold.

name: heartbeat_scan
description: Collect current heartbeat status for all registered components.

name: metrics_rollup
description: Roll up runtime metrics into runtime/metrics/rollup-latest.json.

name: task_reconcile
description: Reconcile expired task leases and move stale tasks into blocked.

name: worktree_gc
description: Clean orphaned managed worktree index records.
